text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur has officially won the Senior Spring
Triple Crown after dominating the Osaka Hai,
spring Tenno Sho, and Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a side effect of her success, her fanbase has
grown dramatically...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get tons more hits when I look her up on social
media sites, and anything the academy publishes
about her accrues attention.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: How 'bout that.
choice_data_list:
What do you think of holding a meet-and-greet
for your fans?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Are you stupid? Don't ask questions you already
know the answer to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur still wants nothing to do with her fans.
But just then, I come across an interesting post.

text_block_list.name: @Sha_sha_sha
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is it true Shakur's a former noble? I totally
could see it, y'know. She's always had a regal air
about her.

text_block_list.name: @MeatEnthusiast
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur's actually a secret agent from another
country. She keeps this country safe from crisis
night after night—when she isn't racing, of course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A lot of false information about her has been
floating around the net. When I tell her this, Air
Shakur dismisses it almost immediately.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That kinda stuff doesn't last. Give it a day and
they'll move on.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Just sit back and enjoy all the fabricated drama.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur's disdain for interviews has resulted in
the public knowing almost nothing about her.
Letting this sit will probably just make the
speculation worse.
choice_data_list: (I hope this doesn't become a problem.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In reality, it becomes a problem far sooner than
expected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's not like her to message me, but it is very like her to only send me a set of coordinates and the word "hurry."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey, over here!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Keep your voice down, dummy!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hey, did you hear someone call out "Shakur" over there?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But she's supposed to be in front of the station! Let's go
check if she's really there!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is gettin' old.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm gettin' played for a fool by a bunch of even
bigger idiots, that's what! My location's bein'
publicized live for the world to see!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Someone snuck a photo of me while I was
shoppin' and posted it online...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And now there's this dumb rumor that catchin' me
in public'll help you level up or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What am I, some kinda mythical creature?! Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things are bad enough with the rumors circling
around, but having her location leaked online live
has created a perfect storm.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch! I'm so damn pissed right now. How dare they
treat me like some kinda toy!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I should hack all their phones and give 'em a taste
of their own medicine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is well within her rights to be angry
over this, but from the posts I've seen, some of
the fans just want the opportunity to talk to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we can use this situation to our advantage, it
could be a good opportunity for Air Shakur to
connect with her fanbase. Hacking people's
phones is out of the question, but...
choice_data_list:
Maybe we can manipulate the information that's
being spread.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Go on!
choice_data_list:
Can you make a few dummy accounts real
quick?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Wait, Shakur's at the park now?!"
"But I just saw her eating at the shopping district."
"Does she have a secret twin? Or maybe she's a
ninja..."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah. The seeds of chaos are startin' to take
root.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That's right, you clowns! How's it feel to be
the ones getting played?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur uses her multiple new accounts to
spread false sightings of herself. The fallout is
intense, and it becomes increasingly difficult to
pinpoint her location.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I threw my real location into the mix for the hell
of it, but I already saw people sayin' they're givin'
up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Things should simmer down soon enough. No one
could possibly check through this many places.
choice_data_list: But what if someone does happen to find you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well... I guess I'd chat with them for a bit as a
reward for their persistence.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I doubt anyone's actually that dogged, though.
Everyone's just been given the runabout by the
people who started this mess, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Ah! You're really here!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Uh, um! I, um... I'm such a big fan of yours!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
When I saw people posting locations where we
might be able to meet you, I rushed out and
began checking all the spots people mentioned!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What? Did you seriously check every single one?

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! No one else I know is a fan, so I didn't
have anyone to cross-check information with...
But I couldn't pass up this opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text: Wheeze, wheeze... I-I've finally found you... My light... My being...

text_block_list.name: Fan E
text_block_list.text:
No way! She's really here! Thank goodness I didn't
wreck my bike for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her fans cheered her on even when no one else
would give her the time of day. I knew there was
no way they'd be any less determined than her.
choice_data_list:
So what was it you said you'd do if they found
you again?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Damn you. I played right into your hand.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You! The one who arrived first. C'mere.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Cut straight to the chase. I don't wanna hear any
sappy talk. You have two minutes.
